subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Upon thee be My glory! The Mother Book hath been revealed, and the showers of grace are pouring down. The path is manifest, and the signs of Truth are evident [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی علیک بهائی ام الکتاب نازل و امطار فضل هاطل سبیل ظاهر و آثار حق هویدا
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @unity; oneness of humanity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transcendence; unknowability of God
